---
title: "Do Facebook and Google care about journalism? Mapping the relationship between affordances of GNI/FJP tools and journalistic norms"
author: "Papa, V., and Kouros, Th."
date: 2023-01-01
description: "Digital Journalism. doi: 10.1080/21670811.2023.2211626"
categories: [Media and Social Media Monitoring]
image: images_publications/journal-article.png
---
